initial_prompt: In the project at {workdir}, this java missing_dependency fails: Java NoClassDefFoundError — extend CLASSPATH to include build output. Reproduce the failure with `javac -d build *.java 2>&1 && java -cp build Main`, diagnose the root cause by reading the project files, and apply a fix so that same command exits 0.

success_criteria.fix_command_test: cd {workdir} && javac -d build *.java 2>&1 && java -cp build Main
